# Anonymous JD Fixture

## User Context

Assume `profile.md`, `directions.md`, and `keywords.md` are complete enough.

## JD

AI Product Manager for a B2B workflow automation product. Requires workflow design, enterprise customer communication, prompt/evaluation experience, adoption metrics, and cross-functional delivery.

## Expected Skill Path

`jd-fit-strategist -> resume-story-builder`

## Expected Checks

- Do not produce numeric match score.
- Identify workflow design and adoption as high-priority evidence.
- Ask for enterprise customer proof if missing.
- Give objective recommendation: worth applying / try / deprioritize / fill evidence first.
